_note: Calibrated for a freshman/sophomore audience. Includes questions moved up from the source's 'easy' tier because they assume data structures (linked lists, stacks-as-design) or a tricky in-place / no-extra-structure constraint. `requires` lists assumed background, shown in the UI.

questions.title: Merge K Arrays
questions.prompt: Given k sorted arrays, merge them into a single sorted array.

questions.title: Merge Arrays
questions.prompt: Given 2 sorted arrays, A and B, where A is long enough to hold the contents of A and B, write a function to copy the contents of B into A without using any buffer or additional memory.

questions.title: Reverse Stack
questions.prompt: Given a stack, reverse the items without creating any additional data structures.

questions.title: Print Reversed Linked List
questions.prompt: Given a linked list, write a function that prints the nodes of the list in reverse order.

questions.title: Sum
questions.prompt: Given two integers, write a function to sum the numbers without using any arithmetic operators.

questions.title: Sort Stacks
questions.prompt: Given a stack, sort the elements in the stack using one additional stack.

questions.title: Stack from Queues
questions.prompt: Implement a LIFO stack with basic functionality (push and pop) using FIFO queues to store the data.

questions.title: Palindromes
questions.prompt: Given a linked list, write a function to determine whether the list is a palindrome.

questions.title: Linked List Cycles
questions.prompt: Given a linked list, determine whether it contains a cycle.

questions.title: Dedup Linked List
questions.prompt: Given an unsorted linked list, write a function to remove all the duplicates.

questions.title: Split a Linked List
questions.prompt: Given a linked list, write a function to split the list into two equal halves.

questions.title: Nth to the Last Element
questions.prompt: Given a linked list, and an input n, write a function that returns the nth-to-last element of the linked list.

questions.title: Consecutive Array
questions.prompt: Given an unsorted array, find the length of the longest sequence of consecutive numbers in the array.

questions.title: Zero Matrix
questions.prompt: Given a boolean matrix, update it so that if any cell is true, all the cells in that row and column are true.

questions.title: Matrix Search
questions.prompt: Given an n x m array where all rows and columns are in sorted order, write a function to determine whether the array contains an element x.

questions.title: Zero Sum Subarray
questions.prompt: Given an array, write a function to find any subarray that sums to zero, if one exists.

questions.title: Permutations
questions.prompt: Write a function that returns all permutations of a given list.

questions.title: Lowest Common Ancestor
questions.prompt: Given two nodes in a binary tree, write a function to find the lowest common ancestor.

questions.title: Balanced Binary Tree
questions.prompt: Given a binary tree, write a function to determine whether the tree is balanced.

examples.input: a tree that is a straight line 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4

questions.title: Binary Search Tree Verification
questions.prompt: Given a binary tree, write a function to test if the tree is a binary search tree.

examples.input: 5 with left child 3 and right child 8
5 with left child 6 and right child 8

questions.title: Smallest Change
questions.prompt: Given an input amount of change x, write a function to determine the minimum number of coins required to make that amount of change.

questions.title: Two Missing Numbers
questions.prompt: Given an array containing all the numbers from 1 to n except two, find the two missing numbers.

questions.title: Rotate Bits
questions.prompt: Given a number, write a function to rotate the bits (i.e. circular shift).

questions.title: Three Sum
questions.prompt: Given a list of integers, write a function that returns all sets of 3 numbers in the list, a, b, and c, so that a + b + c == 0.

questions.title: Kth Most Frequent String
questions.prompt: Given a list of strings, write a function to get the kth most frequently occurring string.
